files.Title: TMPEffects.CharacterData.CharData
files.Summary:
Represents a TextMeshPro character, allowing you to make modifications to its appearance.
Primarily used by and its animations to animate a character.
When used in that manner, modifications made to it (e.g. by using , or directly modifying the ), will be applied by the animator to the actual mesh of the character.
